what_it_is.headline: Barrier balm
what_it_is.body: A barrier-support balm that uses marshmallow root, centella asiatica, and colloidal oatmeal in a richer moisture-sealing step for dry or stressed skin.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Soothing barrier-support blend
why_it_stands_out.body: Centers marshmallow root, centella asiatica, and colloidal oatmeal to support comfort and barrier care instead of acting like a simple occlusive balm.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Richer sealing step
why_it_stands_out.body: Works as a denser balm step that helps lock in moisture when lighter lotions or gels are not enough.

pairing_notes: Use after serum as the sealing moisture step.
Apply a thinner layer in the daytime if you prefer a lighter finish.

watchouts.label: The richer balm texture may feel heavy if you prefer lightweight moisturizers.

product:ext_c4afff42b066fda4a2064729.notes: Curated seller-only rewrite to correct the barrier balm misclassification and keep the card copy grounded in the soothing barrier-support blend.

what_it_is.headline: Barrier balm
what_it_is.body: A barrier-support balm that uses marshmallow root, centella asiatica, and colloidal oatmeal in a richer moisture-sealing step for dry or stressed skin.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Soothing barrier-support blend
why_it_stands_out.body: Centers marshmallow root, centella asiatica, and colloidal oatmeal to support comfort and barrier care instead of acting like a simple occlusive balm.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Richer sealing step
why_it_stands_out.body: Works as a denser balm step that helps lock in moisture when lighter lotions or gels are not enough.

pairing_notes: Use after serum as the sealing moisture step.
Apply a thinner layer in the daytime if you prefer a lighter finish.

watchouts.label: The richer balm texture may feel heavy if you prefer lightweight moisturizers.
